message:
docs(readme): fix ColumnError row — wrong casing + phantom variant (br-r4ar5 / fd90.131)

fd90.131: Error Architecture table at line 824 had three problems
in the ColumnError row:

  | ColumnError | fp-columnar | LengthMismatch, DtypeMismatch, EmptyColumn |

Verified against crates/fp-columnar/src/lib.rs:809:
  pub enum ColumnError {
      LengthMismatch { left, right },
      InvalidSorter { len, reason },
      InvalidMaskType { dtype },
      DTypeMismatch { left, right },     // capital D in DType
      Type(TypeError),                   // transparent wrapper
  }

Three problems:
1. LengthMismatch shown unit-typed; actually struct { left, right }
   (matches the FrameError/IndexError fixes in fd90.124).
2. 'DtypeMismatch' has wrong casing — real name is DTypeMismatch
   (capital D). User pattern-matching with README's name hits E0599
   'no variant'.
3. 'EmptyColumn' is a PHANTOM variant — does not exist in the enum.
   Possibly a stale draft entry that survived rewrites.

Also missing from the row: InvalidSorter, InvalidMaskType — both
real variants users will pattern-match on.

Fix: rewrite the row with the four real variants and their struct
field shapes, dropping the phantom EmptyColumn.

Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -821,7 +821,7 @@ Every crate has its own typed error enum, all implementing `std::error::Error` +
 | Error Type | Crate | Key Variants |
 |-----------|-------|--------------|
 | `TypeError` | fp-types | `IncompatibleDtypes { left, right }` |
-| `ColumnError` | fp-columnar | `LengthMismatch`, `DtypeMismatch`, `EmptyColumn` |
+| `ColumnError` | fp-columnar | `LengthMismatch { left, right }`, `DTypeMismatch { left, right }`, `InvalidMaskType { dtype }`, `InvalidSorter { len, reason }` |
 | `IndexError` | fp-index | `OutOfBounds { position, length }`, `LengthMismatch { expected, actual, context }`, `InvalidAlignmentVectors` |
 | `FrameError` | fp-frame | `LengthMismatch { index_len, column_len }`, `DuplicateIndexUnsupported`, `CompatibilityRejected(String)` |
 | `ExprError` | fp-expr | `ParseError(String)`, `UnknownColumn(String)`, `UnknownLocal(String)` |
